query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  actionType VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, LOGIN, LOGOUT, PERMISSION_CHANGE',
  targetUserId INT COMMENT 'ID do usuário afetado pela ação',
  targetUserName VARCHAR(255) COMMENT 'Nome do usuário afetado',
  actionDetails JSON COMMENT 'Detalhes da ação em JSON',
  oldValues JSON COMMENT 'Valores anteriores (para UPDATE)',
  newValues JSON COMMENT 'Novos valores (para UPDATE)',
  ipAddress VARCHAR(45),
  userAgent TEXT,
  status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'SUCCESS' COMMENT 'SUCCESS, FAILED, PENDING',
  errorMessage TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_userId (userId),
  INDEX idx_targetUserId (targetUserId),
  INDEX idx_actionType (actionType),
  INDEX idx_createdAt (createdAt)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
command:

  status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'SUCCESS' COMMENT 'SUCCESS, FAILED, PENDING',

  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_userId (userId),
  INDEX idx_targetUserId (targetUserId),
  INDEX idx_actionType (actionType),
  INDEX idx_createdAt (createdAt)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
